creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 158026
Update to 3.7.3

Update PowerDNS-Recursor to 3.7.3

"We're pleased to announce a small update to the currently supported
Authoritative server branch 3.3 and Recursor branches 3.6 and 3.7
containing a single patch that will prevent short bursts of high
resource usage with malformed qnames."

Changelog: https://rtfm.powerdns.com/md/changelog/#powerdns-recursor-373
